data.title: Air Products & Chemicals Inc. (NYSE: APD) reports Q3 2025 earnings of $3.09 EPS & $3.02B sales, beating estimates. Year-over-year sales grew 1% despite volume declines from LNG sale and lower global helium demand. Adjusted operating income flat at $741M, with Americas sales up 2% at $1.3B. Operating income down 4% at $374M. Portfolio optimization and project exits impact results.
data.description: Air Products & Chemicals Inc. reported better-than-expected fiscal Q3 2025 results, with adjusted EPS of $3.09 exceeding the estimated $2.98 and sales reaching $3.02 billion, surpassing the expected $2.96 billion. Sales in Q3 increased by 1% year over year, supported by higher energy cost pass-through, favorable pricing, and currency impacts, which counterbalanced volume declines from the September 2024 LNG business sale, lower global helium demand, and exited projects. GAAP EPS rose 4% to $3.24, with GAAP operating income climbing 7% to $791 million due to asset sales. Adjusted operating income remained flat at $741 million despite portfolio adjustments. Air Products' Americas sales increased by 2% to $1.3 billion from higher energy pass-through and pricing, offset by 6% lower volumes due to project exits and weak helium demand. Operating income for the Americas dropped 4% to $374 million, with a 200 basis points margin decrease to 29.7%.(Note: The character count for the summary is 997 characters including spaces)

data.title: EUROAPI released its 2025 Half-Year Financial Report, downloadable from their website.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, EUROAPI released its Half-Year Consolidated Financial Statements for the first six months of 2025. These condensed financial statements cover the period ending on June 30, 2025. Interested parties can access and download the document from EUROAPI’s official website at https://www.euroapi.com/en/investors/regulatory-information/financial-reports. Check the website for detailed financial information.

data.title: Applied Data Finance appoints Deena Narayanaswamy as EVP of Credit Risk, strengthening its team to offer AI-based lending.
data.description: In San Diego, a fintech company called Applied Data Finance (ADF) revealed its new appointments to the executive and leadership teams. They are dedicated to increasing fair credit access for underestimated U.S. consumers by using AI-driven underwriting. Deena Narayanaswamy has been named the Executive Vice President of Credit Risk at ADF, bringing almost 20 years of expertise in this field. These appointments showcase ADF's dedication to delivering scalable, transparent, and data-influenced lending solutions for consumers.
SEC Chair Atkins: Most crypto assets are not securities.

data.title: DeepTempo to appear at Black Hat USA 2025, DEF CON 33, BSides Las Vegas focusing on empowering defenders against evolving threats. Join for talks from August 4.
data.description: A tech company, DeepTempo, known for its behavioral threat detection using deep learning, is set to participate in major cybersecurity events like Black Hat USA 2025, DEF CON 33, and BSides Las Vegas. With the ever-changing cybersecurity environment facing threats driven by AI and polymorphic techniques, DeepTempo aims to support defenders through fostering community, collaboration, and enhanced detection with contextual information. To engage with DeepTempo experts and participate in panel discussions and talks, interested individuals can join them from August 4 onwards at these events. Specifically, DeepTempo can be located at Black Hat USA 2025.

data.title: Inventor from Texas creates PICK-A-PENWHEEL, a new desktop accessory to hold pens, improving workspace organization.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, in Pittsburgh, an inventor from Greenville, Texas, shared details about the creation of the PICK-A-PENWHEEL. The inventor highlighted the inspiration behind the innovation, aiming to find a more efficient method for pen storage and workspace organization. The PICK-A-PENWHEEL presents a superior option to traditional pen cups, offering enhanced organization features. This invention revolutionizes pen storage by providing a more convenient and practical solution for users.

data.title: Basking.io launches LeaseOps platform for efficient lease management in modern workplaces for informed decisions.
data.description: Basking.io has introduced LeaseOps, which takes an operationally-focused strategy towards lease management to facilitate quick, informed choices and optimize portfolios in real time.

data.title: Etsy expects positive growth in Q3, analysts update price targets post mixed Q2 results. Key numbers: PT raised to $64 to $72.
data.description: Etsy Inc (NASDAQ: ETSY) experienced a drop in shares during early trading due to their second-quarter results showing a mix of performance. Key analysts responded differently to the report. Cantor Fitzgerald's Deepak Mathivanan maintained a Neutral rating but adjusted the price target from $52 to $64. On the other hand, Needham's Bernie McTernan stuck with a Buy rating and raised the price target from $55 to $72. Cantor Fitzgerald noted that Etsy surpassed Street expectations in quarterly gross merchandise sales (GMS) and EBITDA by 2% and 4%, respectively. The company also saw a moderation in declines at its core business. To read more about analyst stock ratings and detailed insights, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: ADLM 2025 drew 16,500 attendees discussing plastics impact on health, medical misinformation, and AI in clinics.
data.description: On July 31, 2025 in Chicago, the Association for Diagnostics & Laboratory Medicine (ADLM, previously known as AACC) hosted ADLM 2025, attracting thousands of lab professionals. The event, held from July 27-31, highlighted the latest developments and innovations in the field.

data.title: HTX announces strong growth with increased user base and trading volume for first half of 2025. #Empowerment2025.
data.description: In Panama City on July 31, 2025, HTX disclosed its mid-year results and strategic plan for 2025. The prominent crypto exchange reported strong performance in the first half of the year, showing a significant increase in both user numbers and trading volume. This growth indicates a resilient trend in the company's operations, signaling positive advancement in the market.

data.title: Centric PLM featured in Gartner's 2025 Market Guide, offering comprehensive tools for product development efficiency in the food & beverage industries.
data.description: In an announcement made on July 31, 2025, Centric Software® introduced Centric PLM™ for food & beverage in CAMPBELL, Calif. This innovative system streamlines formulation, specifications, ingredient listings, nutrition details, and regulatory compliance to enhance product development efficiency. This development emphasizes the company's commitment to revolutionizing the industry.
